description: Synthetic candidate that duplicates one PR assignment and omits another.

release_notes_prs.title: Add artifact cleanup preview
release_notes_prs.author: fixture-user
release_notes_prs.body: Adds a preview command so users can inspect artifact cleanup candidates before deleting anything.

release_notes_prs.title: Improve cleanup dry-run output
release_notes_prs.author: fixture-user
release_notes_prs.body: Improves dry-run output for artifact cleanup so users can see why each artifact was selected.

entries.title: Artifact cleanup preview
entries.description: Users can inspect cleanup candidates before deleting artifacts.

entries.title: Cleanup reporting
entries.description: Dry-run output is easier to inspect.

release_notes_body.content:
#### Artifact cleanup preview

Users can inspect cleanup candidates before deleting artifacts ([PR #501](https://github.com/zenml-io/zenml/pull/501)).

Dry-run output now explains why each artifact was selected ([PR #502](https://github.com/zenml-io/zenml/pull/502)).
